tokens.name: LEGEND
tokens.tagline: Built for the ones who beg — the most polite reply guy on Solana.
tokens.description: LEGEND is the calm flex. A gentleman lizard in a space full of noise. No screaming, no begging, no 'next 100x' promises. Just a tux, a vibe, and a community that gets it. Persistent, polite, and inevitable. Moments of legend, with PumpFun creator fees helping support the construction of a school in Nigeria.
